title: hieracium levicaule subsp. tephrophilum
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. tephrophilum, a lesser-known plant species in the dandelion family, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Hieracium. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Hieracium levicaule subsp. tephrophilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
